comment: NEW BEST 7133.77. Each NEW net was CODE-AUDITED by a dedicated agent for PROVABLE exactness over the full generator input space (not just fresh-pass), corroborated with 5k-120k fresh + exhaustive edge sweeps. local +8.48 over base -> LB +8.47 (7125.30->7133.77): FOURTH ~1:1 confirmation. CRITICAL METHOD: passing 3000-fresh is NOT exactness (the old 'dead overlays' 191/009/251/278/383 passed fresh yet leaked private via edge-case bugs). The reliable discriminator is CODE AUDIT of the onnx net vs the generator's FULL input space. This session's audit DROPPED task205 (RISKY: ~0.0075% structural box-detect failure on noise) and KEPT 12 provably-exact -> all transferred 1:1. LEVER (repeatable): rebase onto newest public base + overlay ONLY code-audited-EXACT wins. Silver ~7150 needs +16.2 more; ~390 tasks remain as a mining field for cheaper EXACT rules.
